content.content:
1	In cart.js make THREE changes without breaking any existing behavior:
2	1. addItem(cart, id, qty, price) on an id ALREADY in the cart must ADD to the existing quantity and keep the ORIGINAL price (no duplicate line).
3	2. Add setQty(cart, id, qty): set that item's quantity; if qty <= 0 remove the item entirely; if the id is not present do nothing. Export it.
4	3. Make total(cart) apply a 10% discount to the whole cart when the active code (set via applyCode) is exactly 'SAVE10' (any other code or null = no discount), and round the final total to 2 decimals.
5

file.content:
In cart.js make THREE changes without breaking any existing behavior:
1. addItem(cart, id, qty, price) on an id ALREADY in the cart must ADD to the existing quantity and keep the ORIGINAL price (no duplicate line).
2. Add setQty(cart, id, qty): set that item's quantity; if qty <= 0 remove the item entirely; if the id is not present do nothing. Export it.
3. Make total(cart) apply a 10% discount to the whole cart when the active code (set via applyCode) is exactly 'SAVE10' (any other code or null = no discount), and round the final total to 2 decimals.

content.content: The file /Users/elon/work/fable-profile/eval/comparison/runs/2026-06-18/compound/B/k1/CP1-cart/cart.js has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

lines: function createCart() { return { items: [], code: null }; }
-  return cart.items.reduce((s, it) => s + it.qty * it.price, 0);
+  const sum = cart.items.reduce((s, it) => s + it.qty * it.price, 0);
+module.exports = { createCart, addItem, removeItem, setQty, total, applyCode };

content.text:
All three changes are implemented in `cart.js`:

1. **`addItem`** — now finds an existing line by `id`; if present it adds to the existing `qty` (keeping the original price, no duplicate), otherwise pushes a new line.
2. **`setQty`** — added and exported; does nothing if the id is absent, removes the item when `qty <= 0`, otherwise sets the quantity.
3. **`total`** — applies a 10% discount only when `cart.code === 'SAVE10'`, then rounds to 2 decimals.

Existing behavior (`createCart`, `removeItem`, `applyCode`, and the no-code total path) is preserved.

result:
All three changes are implemented in `cart.js`:

1. **`addItem`** — now finds an existing line by `id`; if present it adds to the existing `qty` (keeping the original price, no duplicate), otherwise pushes a new line.
2. **`setQty`** — added and exported; does nothing if the id is absent, removes the item when `qty <= 0`, otherwise sets the quantity.
3. **`total`** — applies a 10% discount only when `cart.code === 'SAVE10'`, then rounds to 2 decimals.

Existing behavior (`createCart`, `removeItem`, `applyCode`, and the no-code total path) is preserved.
